Name: -1_fashion_music_trendy_genres
Representative_Docs: ['The person would choose comedy, for example, that does not include vulgarity, racism, or violence. Even if this person would normally choose this type of humor, he/she does not do so, out of consideration for those around them who might find these things objectionable.', "If they have a diverse and deep understanding when comparing to the person. If it is about music I would rather trust somebody's opinion if they listen to 10 different genres of music rather than somebody who only listens to one.", 'If I say someone has good taste it means I agree with their sense of style. I think that what they have put together flows well and is cohesive rather than clashes and seems out if place. This applies to fashion and decor. It also might mean they like the same forms of media that I do for the same reasons. Or the same forms of entertainment. It means that I believe that they think similar to me.']

Name: 0_art_mean_say_usually
Representative_Docs: ['When I say that someone has good taste, it means that in my opinion, the things that person likes is similar to what I like, so, therefore, they have good taste.', "Someone has a good taste in something when they're perceived to like something similar to myself. We see 'good taste' in a certain subject as something that we also enjoy. For example, I would say someone has a good taste in food if I perceive that they like similar foods to me. Having a good taste is subjective and aligns closely with my values.", "What I mean by that is they have a taste similar to mine or one I can appreciate. People who enjoy the same type of books or movies or art.  Though I can understand someone may have exceptional taste and I don't agree with it.  Such as enjoying Rothko's art or Wharton's novels."]

Name: 1_interact_services_style_look
Representative_Docs: ['That something is clean, fits well on their person or in ba room, and is on keeping with social norms. There can also be a moral / relational component when talking about dating.', "I think it means that people chose to do or see or say or dress or participate in a way that is morally good and not offensive to other people. They don't like things that are garish. They respect other people and interact with them as they would want others to interact with them. They are not exhibitionists.", 'I believe that it means that they have a good selection of goods or services used by them.  It means other people value those choices and admire their selection of goods or services.  It makes the person more desirable because of a finer choices in life.']
